examples: Which brand of toothpaste do you use?
I went out today and bought a tube of toothpaste.
Shaving supplies, toothpaste, and soap were found inside.
Wal-Mart uses it to track pallets of diapers and toothpaste in some distribution centers and stores.
From toothpaste to an NGO, whatever it is we are doing, let us not forget respect.
